title: meniscium deltigerum
intro: Meniscium deltigerum, also known as the mountain club moss, is a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meniscium deltigerum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as an immunomodulator. Herbal preparations of Meniscium deltigerum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
